item.title: Certificates
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: The Complete Guide To Mastering Python ☞ Show Credential Learn Intellectual Property ☞ Show Credential Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Fundamentals ☞ Show Credential Generative AI Essentials 2 Expertise: Complete Concise Guide ☞ Show Credential nRF Connect SDK Intermediate ☞ Show Credential Bluetooth Low Energy Fundamentals ☞ Show Credential nRF Connect SDK Fundamentals ☞ Show Credential Building AI ☞ Show Credential Elements of AI ☞ Show Credential Product Management ☞ Show Credential
